emails.subject: Re: Gas Bullets
emails.body: Re: Gas Bullets This is a good review of the S/D factors, but what is Paul Carpenter saying and why is he wrong (or is he half right or more)? This is what the big man needs, and you are da man to tell us. Rob Jeff Dasovich Sent by: Jeff Dasovich 04/23/2001 07:07 PM

emails.subject: Re: Gas Bullets
emails.body: Re: Gas Bullets Carpenter is saying that prices went up due to manipulation, pure and simple, we're saying that it's the reasons listed on the 1 1/2 pager that I sent. Give a call and we can discuss further. Best, Jeff
